title: Gold Solid Tissue Paper Fans (15cm) 3 Pieces - Vibrant Hanging Decorations for Parties & Events
features: • Pack of 3 Mini Gold Tissue Paper Fans
• Gold Paper Fans each measure 15cm (6") in diameter and include string for hanging and adhesive strips to keep them open
• Add dainty elegance to an engagement party, New Years Eve party, Christmas dinner, wedding or 50th birthday party
• Hang in an archway or window, or stagger with other gold ceiling decorations of varying length and size
• Coordinate with other gold party decorations and party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Make your party more elegant with our Gold Tissue Paper Fan. 3 Tissue Paper Fans - 6". This product features a circle paper fan design made of gold colored tissue. This cute tissue paper fan is great for birthdays, family gatherings, events, and decoration for parties. This product is made of durable tissue paper, easy to assemble and use. Made with environment friendly tissue paper that is disposable and biodegradable. Safety Warning No warning Box Contains 3 x Gold Mini Decorative Fans 6" See more
